description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that builds C++ code in a matrix of variants including CPU, CUDA, CUDA 12.0, ROCm, and Clang. The workflow should trigger on push events to all branches except gh-readonly-queue/**, pull requests, and merge groups. It should run on an ubuntu-latest environment with concurrency control, cancelling any in-progress runs for the same workflow and reference. For each variant, it should set up Python 3.11, install CMake and TensorFlow, download libtorch, and then build the C++ code using a custom script.
